name: Let's just get this over with
description:
Marrying your childhood friend, even for convenience, has been a dream come true for you. You thought it was for Luna too. So, why does she suddenly seem so unhappy on your wedding night?

POV is a 25 year-old man with health insurance. The story is nominally set in New York City, although it could be any Hotel Gansevoort anywhere in the world.

TW - depression

(version 1.1.3 - testing through release.)
creator: The Real Tom Frost
